seo.title: Koren Academy | Maths and Physics Tutoring Sydney
seo.description: Koren Academy provides small group and private tutoring for Years 8 to 12, with a focus on HSC Mathematics and Physics, understanding, confidence and active thinking.
seo.ogTitle: Koren Academy | Maths and Physics Tutoring Sydney
seo.ogDescription: Small group and private tutoring for Years 8 to 12, with HSC focused support in Mathematics and Physics.
seo.twitterTitle: Koren Academy | Maths and Physics Tutoring Sydney
seo.twitterDescription: Small group and private tutoring for Years 8 to 12, with HSC focused support in Mathematics and Physics.

props.title: Understand.   Don't memorise.
props.lead: Small group and private tutoring for Years 8 to 12, with HSC focused support in Mathematics and Physics. Taught by high ATAR tutors who help students discover where concepts come from, think deeply and build real confidence.
props.microcopy: No pressure, no overpromising. Tell us about the student and we will recommend a suitable next step.

quickFacts.label: Subjects
quickFacts.text: Maths Advanced, Extension 1, Extension 2 and Physics

quickFacts.label: Years
quickFacts.text: Years 8 to 12, with HSC focused support

quickFacts.label: Classes
quickFacts.text: Small groups capped at 5, plus private tutoring

quickFacts.label: Lessons
quickFacts.text: 2 hours and 15 minutes with quiz, theory and exam style practice

quickFacts.label: Price
quickFacts.text: $100 per small group lesson, current rate

props.title: A calmer, deeper way to learn Maths and Physics.
props.lead: Koren Academy helps students truly understand Maths and Physics, not just memorise formulas. Students are guided to ask questions, test ideas, explain their reasoning and discover the logic behind each concept.

props.title: Focused support for senior Maths and Physics.
props.lead: Tutoring is available for students who want the content to feel clearer, more connected and less dependent on memorised formulas.

items.title: Mathematics Advanced
items.text: For students building strong foundations in senior Mathematics, problem solving and exam style reasoning.

items.title: Mathematics Extension 1
items.text: For students ready to think more deeply, strengthen technique and approach harder questions with confidence.

items.title: Mathematics Extension 2
items.text: For students tackling advanced mathematical ideas and wanting careful explanation, challenge and structure.

items.title: Physics
items.text: For students who want to understand the principles behind formulas, diagrams, models and HSC style questions.

props.title: A clear rhythm, built around active thinking.
props.lead: Each lesson runs for 2 hours and 15 minutes. Students revise, review mistakes, learn theory, work through examples and practise exam style questions.

props.title: Clear pricing, small classes and structured support.
props.lead: Each enrolment includes structured lessons, weekly resources, quizzes, exam style practice, homework and parent updates.

items.label: Current rate
items.title: Small group lesson
items.text: Per 2 hour and 15 minute lesson. Small groups require a minimum of 3 students and are capped at 5 students.

items.label: Equivalent rate
items.title: Hourly rate
items.text: The current lesson price works out to $50 per hour.

items.label: Term option
items.title: Term pricing
items.text: For a 9 week term. A 10 week term is $999 after the first term.

props.note: A 5 percent sibling discount may apply. Referral rewards are provided as tutoring credit and applied to a future invoice. Availability depends on subject, year level and suitable class fit.

props.title: Strong results, recent HSC experience and clear explanation.
props.lead: Our tutors understand the current HSC experience because they recently went through it themselves. They teach with care, structure and a focus on understanding.

items.name: Rishon Koren
items.bio: Rishon teaches Mathematics through questions, discovery and careful problem solving. His lessons help students understand the logic behind each method, not just memorise steps.

items.name: Jacob Makmur
items.bio: Jacob teaches Physics by helping students connect formulas to the ideas behind them, so they can approach questions with clearer reasoning and greater confidence.

props.title: A structured and safe learning environment.
props.lead: Parents should know that their child is learning in an environment that is organised, respectful and student focused. Koren Academy keeps classes small, tracks attendance and provides regular updates on student progress.

props.title: A simple thank you for referring another family.
props.lead: Families who refer another student to Koren Academy may receive tutoring credit when the referred student enrols. Referral credit is applied to a future invoice and can help reduce the cost of ongoing lessons.

props.title: Safe, respectful and supportive tutoring.
props.lead: Koren Academy is committed to providing a safe, respectful and supportive environment for all students. Every student has the right to feel safe, heard and treated with dignity during all learning activities.

props.title: Ready to help Maths and Physics make sense?
props.lead: Submit an expression of interest and tell us about the student, their year level, subject, school and goals. We will contact you about suitable class options and availability.

props.title: Enquire about a free trial lesson.
props.lead: Use the enquiry form or contact Koren Academy directly. We will help you find the most suitable option based on subject, year level and availability.
props.formIntro: Tell us the basics and this page will send the enquiry details securely to Koren Academy.
props.successMessage: Great, your enquiry details are ready. We will be in contact with you soon.
props.errorMessage: Sorry, the enquiry could not be sent. Please try again or contact us directly.
